Confidence checks (Step 3 substitutes)

Verification checks

outputs/verification_checks.csv

check_id description status value threshold notes
non_negative All energy series are non-negative PASS 0.000000e+00 >= -1e-9 kWh Minimum across pv/load/self/export/import columns.
pv_split PV split consistency: self-consumed + exported does not exceed PV generation PASS 8.881780e-16 max exceedance <= 1e-6 kWh Computed row-wise exceedance: (self + export - pv).
load_balance Load balance: self-consumed + grid import matches load PASS 2.220450e-16 max abs error <= 1e-6 kWh Absolute row-wise mismatch.
capacity_factor Capacity factor is in a reasonable range PASS 1.070620e-01 0.0 <= CF <= 0.35 CF = annual PV kWh / (system kW * 8760).

Data source details

PV data is sourced from PVGIS (European Commission JRC).

Data source file: data/pvgis_request.txt

Data Source: PVGIS (JRC) — via pvlib.iotools.get_pvgis_hourly
Timestamp (UTC): 2026-03-05T13:10:11+00:00

PVGIS base URL: https://re.jrc.ec.europa.eu/api/v5_3/
PVGIS endpoint: hourly time series (via pvlib.get_pvgis_hourly)

Requested parameters:
- latitude: 52.384
- longitude: -1.5615
- start_year: 2020
- end_year: 2020
- surface_tilt_deg: 0.0
- surface_azimuth_deg: 180.0
- components: True
- pvcalculation: False
- map_variables: True
- timeout_seconds: 60

Cache/source used by pipeline: downloaded:raw_warwick_campus_2020_lat52p384_lonm1p5615_tilt0_az180.csv
Data range (UTC): 2020-01-01 00:11:00+00:00 to 2020-12-31 23:11:00+00:00

Repro steps (Python):
1) pip install pvlib pandas
2) from pvlib.iotools import get_pvgis_hourly
3) call get_pvgis_hourly(...) with the parameters above and url=PVGIS base URL

Notes

If present, see summary.md (and legacy report/summary.md) plus logs.txt for detailed logs.
